novelty_note: Every entry is ORIGINAL_DESIGN: reviewed plugins supply primitives, but the end-to-end behavior was not identified in the reviewed artifacts.

ideas.title: Adaptive Raid Director
ideas.new_behavior: Compute a bounded party-power snapshot at queue lock, select encounter budgets and rewards, then learn from failure streaks without changing difficulty mid-run.
ideas.authoritative_state: Addon-owned RaidPlan keyed by immutable dungeon run UUID; input snapshot is immutable and the dungeon instance only receives a projection.
flow: Queue becomes ready and locks roster/profile IDs
Read progression and equipment through adapters on the server thread
Normalize power, role coverage, recent failures, and gear saturation
Select a signed RaidPlan from admin-defined bounds
Create instance and publish variables/mob/reward budgets
Journal completion or failure exactly once and update the next-run signal
failure_modes: missing optional plugin falls back to configured baseline
roster change invalidates plan before instance creation
unknown API result never raises difficulty
reward journal prevents duplicate grants

ideas.title: Profile-bound Seasonal Relic Board
ideas.new_behavior: Each character owns a versioned seasonal relic board whose slot graph and bonuses migrate safely between seasons without leaking items across profiles.
ideas.authoritative_state: Addon repository keyed by account UUID plus profile UUID plus season ID; MMOInventory is a live projection only.
flow: Register a profile data module and current slot-layout schema
Load and migrate relic IDs while the profile is pending
Populate custom slots only after validation succeeds
Buffer equipment changes and recompute one bonus snapshot
Persist on slot mutation and profile unload with idempotent revision
At season rollover, archive old board and apply explicit carry rules
failure_modes: module validates in finally with degraded empty board
unknown slot IDs move items to recovery escrow
profile switch cancels stale writes by revision
missing MMOItems definition preserves opaque item ID for recovery

ideas.title: Dungeon Reward Escrow And Recovery
ideas.new_behavior: Hold generated rewards in an append-only escrow until clean instance disposal, then grant exactly once or recover after crash/death/profile switch.
ideas.authoritative_state: Transactional addon ledger with run UUID, reward UUID, profile UUID, serialized safe item descriptor, and state PENDING/COMMITTED/CLAIMED/VOID.
flow: Intercept generated loot and replace direct grant with escrow descriptors
Commit escrow after the dungeon outcome is final
On clean disposal, claim rewards under an idempotency key
On restart, reconcile committed but unclaimed entries
Deliver through inventory, mailbox/private drop, or admin recovery queue
Emit an audit event for every state transition
failure_modes: database unavailable blocks final grant but keeps escrow
profile mismatch defers delivery
full inventory uses recovery channel
duplicate callbacks see already-claimed state

ideas.title: Reactive Anatomy Boss
ideas.new_behavior: Named limbs have authoritative health pools; breaking a limb removes attacks, changes movement/animation, detaches equipment, and unlocks encounter routes.
ideas.authoritative_state: Addon BossAnatomy aggregate keyed by encounter UUID; ModelEngine hitboxes and bones are projections of limb state.
flow: Bind configured logical limbs to verified model bone IDs at spawn
Translate sub-hitbox damage into a guarded limb transaction
Publish pre-break event, commit health, and emit post-break event
Switch animation state and disable associated Mythic skills
Update dungeon variables/doors and spawn optional VFX/loot
Dispose tick tasks and hitbox mappings with the instance
failure_modes: missing bone disables that limb mechanic only
model unload never deletes gameplay state
duplicate damage uses transaction sequence
unsupported NMS degrades to ordinary boss hitbox

ideas.title: Item Provenance Ledger
ideas.new_behavior: Issue each high-value item a stable provenance ID and append signed lifecycle facts so staff can detect cloning, impossible transitions, or cross-profile leakage.
ideas.authoritative_state: Append-only addon ledger; item metadata stores only opaque ID and current revision, never the audit truth.
flow: Issue ID during an authorized creation event
Append parent IDs, template, profile, station, and transition hash
On upgrade/reforge/enchant, validate expected revision then append
On inventory/profile boundary, compare item revision with ledger
Quarantine conflicts without destroying evidence
Expose staff search and reconciliation reports
failure_modes: ledger outage fails closed only for configured high-value tiers
legacy items enter explicit adoption flow
duplicate events are idempotent by event UUID
metadata stripping triggers quarantine/recovery

ideas.title: Crafting Research Tree
ideas.new_behavior: Unlock recipe families through experimentation and research nodes, with first-discovery XP and previewable prerequisites.

ideas.title: Dynamic Affix Economy
ideas.new_behavior: Use measured market demand to price reforging and adjust future affix supply inside admin-defined bounds without editing base templates.

ideas.title: Party Synergy Relics
ideas.new_behavior: Relics activate composition bonuses from nearby party roles and recompute once per roster/equipment transaction.

ideas.title: Waypoint Caravan Contracts
ideas.new_behavior: Generate timed trade routes whose cargo value, ambushes, and destination prices respond to server activity.

ideas.title: Cross-server Expedition Character
ideas.new_behavior: Create a temporary expedition profile, transfer it across a cluster, then merge only whitelisted rewards into the home character.

ideas.title: Death Insurance And Recovery Hunt
ideas.new_behavior: Insured items return through escrow while uninsured losses become owner-bound recovery encounters rather than instant deletion.

ideas.title: Privacy-light Balance Telemetry Advisor
ideas.new_behavior: Aggregate anonymous balance signals and produce review suggestions without automatically editing production configuration.

ideas.title: Contextual Resource HUD
ideas.new_behavior: Switch accessible HUD panels by class, combat state, held item, station, and current objective.

ideas.title: Account Legacy, Character Mastery
ideas.new_behavior: Split account-wide unlocks from profile-local mastery with explicit inheritance, respec, and migration rules.

ideas.title: Relic Evolution
ideas.new_behavior: A relic branches from dungeon feats, unlocks namespaced enchants, and changes lore/model form at milestones.

ideas.title: Furniture Puzzle Runtime
ideas.new_behavior: Treat instance-scoped furniture orientation and state as a validated puzzle graph that opens room routes.

ideas.title: Waystone Conquest Network
ideas.new_behavior: Dungeon clears activate physical waystones and unlock a persistent, contestable travel graph.

ideas.title: Enchantment Trials
ideas.new_behavior: Trial constraints alter the next enchant offer and award a bounded guaranteed result or talent branch.

ideas.title: Spellbound Enchants
ideas.new_behavior: An enchant casts a learned RPG spell through a shared cooldown/reagent transaction with recursion and PvP guards.

ideas.title: Procedural Party-synergy Layout
ideas.new_behavior: Weight room connectors by role composition and inject compensating challenges for missing capabilities.

ideas.title: Party Loot Contract
ideas.new_behavior: Players choose need/greed/round-robin rules per run; typed rules route rewards into an auditable ledger.

ideas.title: Living Strongholds
ideas.new_behavior: Player groups build persistent strongholds that can instantiate as attackable dungeons with evolving defenses.

ideas.title: Seasonal Affix Engine
ideas.new_behavior: Rotate deterministic weekly encounter and loot affixes with preview, audit, and rollback support.

ideas.title: Accessibility Casting Layer
ideas.new_behavior: Offer alternate input profiles, readable cooldown cues, high-contrast state, and one-handed casting without changing balance.

ideas.title: Audience-specific Phase Skins
ideas.new_behavior: Different parties or quest phases see different visual boss states while sharing one authoritative encounter entity.

ideas.title: Root-motion Dungeon Traversal
ideas.new_behavior: Validated animation motion drives vaulting, finishers, and trap traversal while the server remains authoritative.

ideas.title: Living UI Familiar
ideas.new_behavior: A companion model becomes a context-aware quest, profile, and progression navigator with accessible fallback menus.

ideas.title: Adaptive Model Detail Governor
ideas.new_behavior: Allocate a per-viewer visual budget from measured load while preserving hitbox and gameplay state.

ideas.title: Spectral Replay Ghosts
ideas.new_behavior: Record privacy-safe transform streams and replay previous dungeon runs as non-interactive coaching ghosts.

ideas.title: Mount Talent System
ideas.new_behavior: Unlock versioned movement controllers and mount abilities per character with safe dismount and downgrade behavior.
